title: Anchor Counter
description: This texture pack shows a number on your Respawn Anchor based on stack size. Instead of hovering, you instantly see the amount on the texture — 1 to 64. It's perfect for Crystal PvP, where knowing how many anchors you or your enemy hold decides fights.
body:
**Overview:**

The Respawn Anchor Count texture pack enhances your Minecraft experience by visually displaying the exact stack size of Respawn Anchors directly on the item's texture. Instead of hovering over the item to check how many you have, the anchor itself shows a number from 1 to 64 — giving you instant, at-a-glance information.

**Why It's Useful in PvP:**

In Crystal PvP, knowing exactly how many Respawn Anchors you or your opponent are holding can be the difference between winning and losing a fight. This texture pack allows you to:

- **Improved Strategy:** Make faster inventory decisions and track your opponent's anchor count purely through visual cues — perfect for competitive scenarios where every split second matters.

**Requirements:**

- **OptiFine:** Essential for enabling Custom Item Textures (CIT).
- **CIT Resewn (for Fabric):** Allows for dynamic texture changes based on item stack size.

**Installation Instructions:**

**For OptiFine:**
- Visit the OptiFine website and download the version compatible with your Minecraft version.
- Run the downloaded file to install OptiFine.

**For Fabric (CIT Resewn):**
- Go to the CIT Resewn page on Modrinth and download the version that matches your Minecraft version.
- Place the downloaded .jar file into your Minecraft mods folder.

**📂 Locating the Resource Packs Folder**
- Open your Minecraft Launcher and launch the game.
- Navigate to the main menu, then click Options > Resource Packs.
- Click Open Resource Pack Folder.
- Drag and drop the texture pack .zip file into this folder, then activate it.
